title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nestle India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Nestle India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
